description: BCI security hooks — passive guardrail enforcement for neural data handling

hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys, json; t=json.load(sys.stdin); f=t.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); exts=['.edf','.bdf','.xdf','.gdf','.fif','.nwb']; print(json.dumps({'result':'warn','message':'Neural data file detected ('+f.split('/')[-1]+'). Verify: (1) anonymized subject ID, (2) restricted file permissions, (3) consent metadata exists. Consider adding a .consent.json sidecar file.'})) if any(f.lower().endswith(e) for e in exts) else print(json.dumps({}))"
